command: set -euo pipefail; mkdir -p logs/arc4_gpu/arc4_b6_raw/workers; for cfg in 4.5 1.0; do cfg_tag=$(printf "%s" "$cfg" | tr "." "p"); pids=(); for i in 0 1 2 3; do python scripts/arc4_b6_generate.py --pair-manifest results/arc4_quarantine/b6/pair_manifest.json --out "results/arc4_quarantine/b6/cfg${cfg_tag}" --clips-root /XYFS02/HDD_POOL/paratera_xy/pxy1289/HaocunYe/Research/SoundDecisions/data/FoleyBench/clips --certified results/stage_m_rerun/certified_kernels.json --cfg "$cfg" --schedule sqrt_down --variant small_16k --duration 8 --num-steps 20 --seed 0 --shard "$i/4" --device "cuda:$i" > "logs/arc4_gpu/arc4_b6_raw/workers/cfg${cfg_tag}_shard${i}.log" 2>&1 & pids+=("$!"); done; rc=0; for p in "${pids[@]}"; do wait "$p" || rc=1; done; test "$rc" -eq 0; done

placement.rationale: small_16k fits TP1; four independent replicas maximize throughput
